_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Astra WhatsApp Bot Stable
author: danimaru-ze
description: WhatsApp Bot egg yang stabil dan ringan untuk Pterodactyl Panel. Tanpa PM2, langsung pakai Node.js native dengan graceful shutdown. Dilengkapi FFmpeg, ImageMagick, dan tools penting lainnya. Support Node.js 18-25 dengan pilihan OS AstraHost.
startup:
if [ -f package.json ]; then if [ ! -d node_modules ] || [ package.json -nt node_modules ]; then echo -e "
[DEPENDENCY CHECK] Dependencies not found or outdated"; echo "[INSTALL] Installing dependencies..."; npm install --production; echo -e "[INSTALL] Dependencies installed successfully!
"; fi; fi; if [[ {{AUTO_UPDATE}} == "1" ]] && [[ -d .git ]]; then echo -e "[AUTO-UPDATE] Checking for updates..."; git pull && echo "[AUTO-UPDATE] Installing updated dependencies..." && npm install --production; echo -e "[AUTO-UPDATE] Update complete!
"; fi; echo "[STARTUP] Starting WhatsApp Bot..."; echo ""; exec {{STARTUP_CMD}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Astra WhatsApp Bot - Installation Script
# Optimized for stability and performance

set -e

RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

echo -e "${BLUE}"
echo "========================================="
echo "   Astra WhatsApp Bot Installation"
echo "========================================="
echo -e "${NC}"

# Update and install system dependencies
echo -e "${YELLOW}[1/5] Updating system packages...${NC}"
apt update -qq
apt install -y -qq git curl jq file unzip make gcc g++ python3 python3-dev libtool > /dev/null 2>&1
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ System packages updated${NC}"

# Create and navigate to server directory
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

echo -e "${YELLOW}[2/5] Checking installation mode...${NC}"

# Check if user uploaded files manually
if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    echo -e "${BLUE}User upload mode enabled${NC}"
    
    if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
        echo -e "${YELLOW}[3/5] Found package.json, installing dependencies...${NC}"
        npm install --production
        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Dependencies installed${NC}"
    else
        echo -e "${RED}WARNING: No package.json found!${NC}"
        echo -e "${YELLOW}Please upload your bot files including package.json${NC}"
    fi
    
    echo -e "${GREEN}"
    echo "========================================="
    echo "   Installation Complete (User Upload)"
    echo "========================================="
    echo -e "${NC}"
    exit 0
fi

# Validate Git repository
if [ -z "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
    echo -e "${RED}ERROR: GIT_ADDRESS is empty!${NC}"
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Please provide a valid Git repository URL in egg configuration${NC}"
    exit 1
fi

# Ensure .git extension
if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
fi

# Configure Git credentials
if [ -z "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo -e "${BLUE}Using anonymous Git clone${NC}"
else
    echo -e "${BLUE}Using authenticated Git clone${NC}"
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

echo -e "${YELLOW}[3/5] Cloning repository...${NC}"
echo "Repository: ${GIT_ADDRESS}"

# Check if directory is not empty
if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Directory not empty, checking for existing repository...${NC}"
    
    if [ -d .git ]; then
        if [ -f .git/config ]; then
            ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
            echo "Found repository: ${ORIGIN}"
            
            if [ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
                echo -e "${BLUE}Pulling latest changes...${NC}"
                git pull
            else
                echo -e "${RED}ERROR: Different repository detected!${NC}"
                echo "Existing: ${ORIGIN}"
                echo "Requested: ${GIT_ADDRESS}"
                exit 1
            fi
        else
            echo -e "${RED}ERROR: Invalid .git directory${NC}"
            exit 1
        fi
    else
        echo -e "${RED}ERROR: Directory not empty and not a git repository${NC}"
        echo -e "${YELLOW}Please enable USER_UPLOAD mode or clear the directory${NC}"
        exit 1
    fi
else
    # Clone repository
    if [ -z "${BRANCH}" ]; then
        git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    else
        echo "Using branch: ${BRANCH}"
        git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    fi
fi

echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Repository cloned successfully${NC}"

# Install dependencies
if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[4/5] Installing dependencies...${NC}"
    echo "This may take a few minutes..."
    npm install --production
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Dependencies installed${NC}"
else
    echo -e "${RED}WARNING: No package.json found!${NC}"
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Make sure your repository contains package.json${NC}"
fi

# Final check
echo -e "${YELLOW}[5/5] Finalizing installation...${NC}"

if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ package.json found${NC}"
fi

if [ -d /mnt/server/node_modules ]; then
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ node_modules directory exists${NC}"
fi

echo -e "${GREEN}"
echo "========================================="
echo "     Installation Complete!"
echo "========================================="
echo -e "${NC}"
echo -e "${BLUE}Next steps:${NC}"
echo "1. Configure your bot settings if needed"
echo "2. Click the START button to run your bot"
echo "3. Check the console for QR code or connection status"
echo ""

exit 0

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: Git repository URL to clone (e.g., https://github.com/username/wabot)

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: Branch to clone (leave empty for default branch)

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Git access token or password for private repositories (optional)

variables.name: Startup Command
variables.description: Command to start the bot (e.g., npm start, node index.js, node main.js)

variables.name: Auto Update on Restart
variables.description: Auto pull latest changes from Git when server restarts (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: User Upload Mode
variables.description: Enable if you want to upload bot files manually instead of cloning from Git (true/false)
